problem id: e20aa7b7
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(1) OR SHL(2)

examples:
  10010110 -> 01111101
  11101100 -> 11111001
  11001100 -> 10111001
  10010111 -> 01111111
  01111011 -> 11111110
  00000000 -> 00000000
  10100110 -> 11011101
  00000101 -> 00011110
  00001101 -> 00111110
  01100010 -> 11001100

query: 10011010
predicted answer: 01111101
